title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Orochi, Unknown person #1, Kanjuro, Kinemon, Beast Pirates, Kozuki Alliance as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Thanks to the message from Kanjuro,

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The movements of the Red Scabbards

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The vengeful plan of the Samural.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their ghosts would finally be able to vanish from his nightmares.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The total number of men exceed 5000!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were advancing to the ocean depths with the Red Scabbrads

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: The castle where Kaido and Orochi reside!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As for Kanjuro, who had momo as hostage

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He was supposed to meet with Crochi,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the first time I've ever been here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He has yet to get there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never thought it would be this complicated....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am still an enemy in their eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Report to Sir Orochi About Kinemon and the others...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But how do I get to him?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that the army of roughly 5000 men are advancing!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 36 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
